channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 30.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Ministers accused of cover-up after admitting withholding some Mandelson files
item.description: Ministers accused of cover-up after admitting withholding some Mandelson files

item.title: FT UK Politics: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election
item.description: Reform UK unveils candidate to challenge Andy Burnham in by-election

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Senior figures in Blue Labour turn on Burnham over Brexit
item.description: Senior figures in Blue Labour turn on Burnham over Brexit

item.title: FT UK Politics: How will Andy Burnham pay for his plans for the UK?
item.description: How will Andy Burnham pay for his plans for the UK?

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK police probe child sexual abuse claims after Epstein revelations
item.description: UK police probe child sexual abuse claims after Epstein revelations

item.title: i Politics: Cabinet wooing Burnham for top jobs - with Miliband eyeing chancellor
item.description: Cabinet wooing Burnham for top jobs - with Miliband eyeing chancellor

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Delusional, desperate and mostly called David, Brexiters gather to lament the Great Betrayal | John Crace
item.description: Delusional, desperate and mostly called David, Brexiters gather to lament the Great Betrayal | John Crace

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Politics latest: Starmer under pressure over Mandelson vetting files release after fresh delay

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Minister defends Mandelson file redactions and says documents to be released in June – UK politics live

item.title: BBC Politics: John Swinney wins vote to be re-appointed first minister
